heading: Printing for committees of Congress
label: 726 Printing for committees of Congress
text: A committee of Congress may not procure the printing of more than one thousand copies of a hearing, or other document germane thereto, for its use except by simple, concurrent, or joint resolution, as provided by .section 703 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 154 (, ; , ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 228 Stat. 601Mar. 1, 1907, ch. 2284, § 134 Stat. 1012
